name: Arauca (Colombia)

colors.symbolism: the blood, courage and sacrifice of the Llanero people in the wars of independence
the vast llanos (plains) of Arauca and the hope of its inhabitants

description: A horizontal bicolour of red over green in equal halves.
history: Adopted as the flag of the department of Arauca, the design recalls the colours flown by the Llanero patriot forces during the Wars of Independence. Arauca was created as an Intendancy in 1955 and elevated to a department by the 1991 Constitution.

features.symbolism: red for the blood and valour of the Llanero people; green for the vast plains and the hope of the future
